translations.ja: ここは整理が足りない。

tokens.explanation: Subject pronoun (3rd person singular, generic/colloquial for 'we' or 'one'); grammatical subject of the verb.
Main verb, present indicative 3rd person singular; 'to lack'; selects 'de' to introduce what is lacking.
Preposition 'de' elided before a vowel; introduces the noun complement.
Common noun, feminine singular; complement of 'de' after 'manquer'.
Adverb of place; indicates location.

sentences.target: Cette organisation aide les familles du quartier.
sentences.reading: /sɛt ɔʁɡanizasjɔ̃ ɛd le famij dy kaʁtje/

translations.fr: Cette organisation aide les familles du quartier.
translations.ipa: /sɛt ɔʁɡanizasjɔ̃ ɛd le famij dy kaʁtje/
translations.es: Esta organización ayuda a las familias del barrio.
translations.de: Diese Organisation hilft den Familien im Viertel.
translations.it: Quest'organizzazione aiuta le famiglie del quartiere.
translations.zh-Hans: 这个组织帮助社区的家庭。
translations.yue: 呢個組織幫助社區嘅家庭。
translations.pt: Esta organização ajuda as famílias do bairro.
translations.tr: Bu kuruluş mahalledeki ailelere yardım ediyor.
translations.vi: Tổ chức này giúp các gia đình trong khu phố.
translations.nl: Deze organisatie helpt de gezinnen in de wijk.
translations.hu: Ez a szervezet segít a környékbeli családoknak.
translations.hi: यह संगठन मोहल्ले के परिवारों की मदद करता है.
translations.pl: Ta organizacja pomaga rodzinom w dzielnicy.
translations.el: Αυτή η οργάνωση βοηθά τις οικογένειες της γειτονιάς.
translations.nb: Denne organisasjonen hjelper familiene i nabolaget.
translations.id: Organisasi ini membantu keluarga di lingkungan.
translations.sv: Den här organisationen hjälper familjer i kvarteret.
translations.ro: Această organizație ajută familiile din cartier.
translations.cs: Tato organizace pomáhá rodinám v sousedství.
translations.da: Denne organisation hjælper familierne i kvarteret.
translations.ja: この団体は近所の家族を支援しています。

tokens.explanation: Demonstrative determiner, feminine singular; modifies 'organisation'.
Common noun, feminine singular; subject of the verb 'aide'.
Main verb, present indicative 3rd person singular; agrees with the subject 'organisation'.
Definite article, plural; introduces 'familles'.
Common noun, feminine plural; direct object of 'aide'.
Contracted 'de' + 'le' (= 'du'); introduces the noun complement 'quartier' (of the neighborhood).
Common noun, masculine singular; object of the preposition in 'du quartier'.

sentences.target: Ton organisation au travail me surprend.

translations.fr: Ton organisation au travail me surprend.
translations.en: Your organization at work surprises me.
translations.es: Tu organización en el trabajo me sorprende.
translations.it: La tua organizzazione al lavoro mi sorprende.
translations.zh-Hans: 你在工作中的条理性让我惊讶。
translations.yue: 你喺工作上嘅條理令我驚訝。
translations.ru: Твоя организованность на работе меня удивляет.
translations.pt: Sua organização no trabalho me surpreende.
translations.vi: Sự ngăn nắp của bạn trong công việc làm tôi ngạc nhiên.
translations.nl: Jouw organisatie op het werk verbaast me.
translations.uk: Твоя організованість на роботі мене дивує.
translations.hi: काम पर तुम्हारी व्यवस्थितता मुझे हैरान करती है.
translations.el: Η οργάνωσή σου στη δουλειά με εκπλήσσει.
translations.nb: Din organisering på jobb overrasker meg.
translations.sv: Din organisering på jobbet överraskar mig.
translations.ro: Organizarea ta la locul de muncă mă surprinde.
translations.cs: Tvoje organizovanost v práci mě překvapuje.
translations.da: Din organisering på arbejdet overrasker mig.
translations.ja: あなたの仕事での段取りに驚いています。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner (2nd person singular), used before a feminine noun beginning with a vowel sound; modifies 'organisation'.
Common noun, feminine singular; head of the subject noun phrase.
Contracted 'à' + 'le' (= 'au'); introduces 'travail'; PP modifies the noun ('organisation au travail').
Common noun, masculine singular; object of the preposition in 'au travail'.
Clitic object pronoun, 1st person singular; direct object of 'surprend'.
Main verb, present indicative 3rd person singular; takes 'me' as its object, subject is 'Ton organisation au travail'.

sentences.target: Je rejoins une organisation étudiante cette semaine.
sentences.reading: /ʒə ʁəʒwɛ̃ yn ɔʁɡanizasjɔ̃ etydjɑ̃t sɛt səmɛn/

translations.fr: Je rejoins une organisation étudiante cette semaine.
translations.ipa: /ʒə ʁəʒwɛ̃ yn ɔʁɡanizasjɔ̃ etydjɑ̃t sɛt səmɛn/
translations.en: I'm joining a student organization this week.
translations.es: Esta semana me uno a una organización estudiantil.
translations.de: Diese Woche trete ich einer Studentenorganisation bei.
translations.it: Questa settimana mi unisco a un'organizzazione studentesca.
translations.zh-Hans: 我这周加入一个学生组织。
translations.yue: 我呢個禮拜加入一個學生組織。
translations.ru: На этой неделе я вступаю в студенческую организацию.
translations.pt: Esta semana vou entrar para uma organização estudantil.
translations.tr: Bu hafta bir öğrenci topluluğuna katılıyorum.
translations.vi: Tuần này tôi tham gia một tổ chức sinh viên.
translations.ar: سأنضم هذا الأسبوع إلى منظمة طلابية.
translations.nl: Deze week sluit ik me aan bij een studentenorganisatie.
translations.uk: Цього тижня я приєднуюся до студентської організації.
translations.hu: Ezen a héten csatlakozom egy diákszervezethez.
translations.hi: इस हफ्ते मैं एक छात्र संगठन में शामिल हो रहा हूँ.
translations.pl: W tym tygodniu dołączam do organizacji studenckiej.
translations.el: Αυτή την εβδομάδα εντάσσομαι σε μια φοιτητική οργάνωση.
translations.nb: Denne uken blir jeg med i en studentorganisasjon.
translations.id: Minggu ini saya bergabung dengan organisasi mahasiswa.
translations.sv: Den här veckan går jag med i en studentorganisation.
translations.ro: Săptămâna aceasta mă alătur unei organizații studențești.
translations.cs: Tento týden se přidávám ke studentské organizaci.
translations.da: Denne uge melder jeg mig ind i en studenterorganisation.
translations.ja: 今週、学生団体に参加します。

tokens.explanation: Subject pronoun, 1st person singular; subject of 'rejoins'.
Main verb, present indicative 1st person singular; 'to join'.
Indefinite article, feminine singular; introduces 'organisation'.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of 'rejoins'.
Adjective, feminine singular; relational adjective modifying 'organisation'.
Demonstrative determiner, feminine singular; modifies 'semaine'.
Common noun, feminine singular; temporal complement ('this week').
